content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive tied to a specific star rating.
Pierre: Apple treats this as review manipulation (5.6.3) and a direct violation of 2.3.9 since it conditions a free reward on leaving a 5-star review, which also biases users away from honest ratings. This copy must be removed entirely; if you want to prompt reviews, use SKStoreReviewController/`requestReview` with no reward attached, and don't reference star counts in any incentive text.
